burst.msg_body: Multiple burst reads of length 128 and bit width 128 in loop 'LOAD_X_VEC' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem_x'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst reads of length 72 and bit width 128 in loop 'LOAD_WV' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem_V'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst reads of length 288 and bit width 128 in loop 'LOAD_DOWN_Q4K' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem_Wd'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst reads of length 420 and bit width 128 in loop 'LOAD_DOWN_Q6K' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem_Wd'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst writes of length 2048 and bit width 32 in loop 'anonymous' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem_out'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.
